items.name: compare-slider
items.title: Compare Slider
items.description: A before/after comparison. Both layers stay perfectly registered while a draggable divider clips between them on a soft spring. Works with images or any React content; arrow keys move the divider too.

items.name: confetti-button
items.title: Confetti Button
items.description: A button that fires a confetti burst from its center on click.

items.name: dock
items.title: Dock
items.description: A macOS-style dock. Icons magnify smoothly as the cursor approaches, with springy tooltips and running-app indicator dots.

items.name: hold-button
items.title: Hold Button
items.description: A deliberate press-and-hold action with pointer and keyboard support, visible progress, early-release cancellation, and a calm success state.

items.name: morph-tabs
items.title: Morph Tabs
items.description: An accessible tab set with roving keyboard focus, a shared spring-morphing selection surface, and direction-aware panel transitions.

items.name: notification-stack
items.title: Notification Stack
items.description: A compact notification center whose cards fan out on hover, focus, or tap. Notifications can be dismissed and restored, with controlled expansion and polite live-region announcements for assistive technology.

items.name: number-ticker
items.title: Number Ticker
items.description: An accessible odometer-style number. Each digit lives on a vertical reel and rolls to its new value on a spring, taking the shortest path around it.

items.name: orbit-menu
items.title: Orbit Menu
items.description: A responsive radial command menu with spring-launched actions around a central trigger. It collapses into a touch-friendly command tray on narrow screens and includes roving keyboard focus, dismissal behavior, and a reduced-motion mode.

items.name: reorder-list
items.title: Reorder List
items.description: A controlled or uncontrolled sortable list with handle-only pointer dragging, visible keyboard move controls, position announcements, and reduced-motion support.

items.name: scrub-input
items.title: Scrub Input
items.description: A Figma-style numeric input. Drag horizontally across the label to scrub the value — hold Shift for ×10, Alt for ×0.1 — or click the number to type it directly. Arrow keys nudge when the field is focused.

items.name: slide-to-confirm
items.title: Slide To Confirm
items.description: A slide-to-unlock control for destructive or irreversible actions. Drag the knob to the end to confirm; release early and it springs back. The prompt carries a slow shimmer and fades as you drag.

items.name: spotlight-card
items.title: Spotlight Card
items.description: A card whose border and interior glow follow the cursor with a soft spring.

items.name: status-button
items.title: Status Button
items.description: A button that runs an async action and morphs through loading, success and error states — spinner, drawn-in checkmark, shake — resizing itself to fit each label, then reverts to idle.

items.name: swipe-deck
items.title: Swipe Deck
items.description: An accessible stack of cards that can be approved or rejected with a gesture, visible controls, or the arrow keys. Includes spring recovery, undo, reset, and reduced-motion behavior.

items.name: tilt-card
items.title: Tilt Card
items.description: A 3D perspective card that tilts toward the cursor with a moving glare. Children can pop out of the surface with `[transform:translateZ(..px)]`.

items.name: waveform-scrubber
items.title: Waveform Scrubber
items.description: A compact media waveform with an animated playhead, standalone playback, pointer scrubbing, and complete slider keyboard semantics.
